title: dalbergia pinnata
intro: Dalbergia pinnata, also known as Pinnate Dalbergia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its alkaloid and flavonoid content. The health benefits associated with Dalbergia pinnata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support digestive health. In herbal preparations, Dalbergia pinnata is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
